title: The Dragon-Hatching Feast
description: A royal feast to celebrate the hatching of dragon eggs, ended by King Baelenys collapsing from poison and the Red Keep locked down in suspicion.

title: Wedding at Driftmark
description: The Velaryon seat of High Tide hosts a grand wedding, drawing half the nobility of the eastern coast to Driftmark's harbor.

title: The Massacre at Oldtown
description: Prince Gaelor's vanguard clashes with Oldtown's knights in the castle courtyard — a slaughter the Citadel and the Reach will remember for a hundred years.
